hvac-filter-change.name: Replace HVAC filter
hvac-filter-change.consequencesOfSkipping: Reduced airflow, higher energy use, premature blower wear, and worse indoor air quality.

ac-tune-up.name: AC professional tune-up
ac-tune-up.consequencesOfSkipping: Compressor failure during peak season — emergency call-out rates and lost nights.

smoke-detector-test.name: Test smoke + CO detectors
smoke-detector-test.consequencesOfSkipping: Code violation, insurance void, life-safety risk.

deep-clean.name: Deep clean (between full turnovers)
deep-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Grime buildup leads to lower review scores; hard surfaces lose finish over time.

gutter-clean.name: Clean gutters
gutter-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Water damage to fascia, foundation, or basement.

water-heater-flush.name: Flush water heater
water-heater-flush.consequencesOfSkipping: Sediment buildup shortens lifespan and reduces hot water capacity.

dryer-vent-clean.name: Clean dryer vent
dryer-vent-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Lint fire risk; longer dry times shred linens and raise utility bills.

pest-control.name: Quarterly pest control
pest-control.consequencesOfSkipping: One-star reviews, refunds, infestation eradication costs.

caulk-grout-inspect.name: Inspect & re-caulk bath/kitchen
caulk-grout-inspect.consequencesOfSkipping: Hidden water damage behind tile; mold remediation later.
